overview.description: The LOGIQ Contrarian Opportunities ETF (LCO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed fund, primarily comprised of US and foreign equity securities. It uses a contrarian investment strategy and may also hold preferred stocks, debt instruments, and other ETFs in seeking total return. LCO was launched on Jan 8, 2026 and is issued by LOGIQ.
